name: Soft Chocolate Frosting/Filling
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon vanilla extract or vanilla sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the sugar, potato starch, and salt.
2. Gradually add boiling water while stirring constantly until all ingredients are combined.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring continuously, until the mixture reaches a boil. Boil for one minute, then remove from the heat.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips until smooth.
5. Add the margarine and vanilla extract (or vanilla sugar). Mix well.
6. Spread the frosting while it is warm.
